{{Infobox location
| name = Fathom system
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Fathom system]] is the headquarters of the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24">''The Pilot'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Fathom system]] is a location where combat occurs.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29">''The Pilot'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|A battle occurred in the [[Fathom system]] less than a week prior.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c34">''The Pilot'', chapter 34</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
